case_title: ROMAN CATHOLIC WELFARE CORP.OF SF/ST.PAUL SHIPWRCK VS INDEMNITY CO OF CALIFORNIA-BONNIE L.MCLENNAN et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY ROMAN CATHOLIC WELFARE CORP.OF SF/ST.PAUL SHIPWRCK AS TO DEFENDANT INDEMNITY CO OF CALIFORNIA-BONNIE L.MCLENNAN D.G CARPET DISTRIBUTORS,INC.LISC. #420731 EARL M.PALTER & PARTNERS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-30-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
TRIAL RESET TO OCT-08-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02 TRIAL OF SEP-30-1993 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT. RECEIPT TO BONNIE MCLENNAN RETURNED SIGNED.
CERT. LETTER TO CARPET DISTRIBUTORS RETURNED UNCLAIMED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROMAN CATHOLIC WELFARE CORP.OF SF/ST.PAUL SHIPWRCK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT INDEMNITY CO OF CALIFORNIA-BONNIE L.MCLENNAN D.G CARPET DISTRIBUTORS,INC.LISC. #420731 EARL M.PALTER & PARTNERS $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $24.58 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,024.58 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOT. OF JUDGMENT TO D.G. CARPET DIST. RETURNED, REFUSED.
MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROMAN CATHOLIC WELFARE CORP.OF SF/ST.PAUL SHIPWRCK HEARING SET FOR DEC-07-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
NOT. OF MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION SENT TO D.G. CARPET RETURNED, NO LONGER AT THIS ADDRESS.
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION OF DEC-07-1993, GRANTED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT INDEMNITY CO OF CALIFORNIA-BONNIE L.MCLENNAN D.G CARPET DISTRIBUTORS,INC.LISC. #420731 EARL M.PALTER & PARTNERS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO D.G.CARPETS DISTRI- BUTORS, INC. RETURNED, NO LONGER AT THAT ADDRESS.
